name: SMC-ES: Automated synthesis of formally verified control policies

description: arXiv:2607.15003v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The deployment of autonomous cyber-physical systems in safety-critical environments requires closed-loop control strategies (i.e., policies) that are not only performant but also provably safe and robust. While learning-based methodologies such as Reinforcement Learning offer flexible and scalable approaches to automatically synthesize such contro...
author: Riccardo Curcio, Toni Mancini, Enrico Tronci
